# Frankly Financial

> Frankly Financial provides bookkeeping, financial reporting, and tax support for
> small businesses in Toronto and across Canada. Plain-English service: monthly
> bookkeeping, CFO-grade reports, HST and corporate tax filing support.

Website: https://franklyfinancial.co
Location: Toronto, Ontario, Canada
Contact: hello@franklyfinancial.co

## Services
- Monthly bookkeeping for small businesses
- Financial reports and KPI dashboards
- Corporate tax (T2) and HST filing support
- Catch-up bookkeeping for businesses behind on their books
- Payroll support

## Guides (plain-English, updated for 2026 Canadian tax rules)
- [How to Choose a Small Business Accountant in Toronto](https://franklyfinancial.co/blog/small-business-accountant-toronto): costs, bookkeeper vs. CPA, hiring questions
- [Bookkeeping Services in Toronto: Costs & Options](https://franklyfinancial.co/blog/bookkeeping-services-toronto): 2026 pricing, DIY vs. outsourced
- [How Much Does a Bookkeeper Cost in Canada?](https://franklyfinancial.co/blog/bookkeeper-cost-canada): 2026 hourly and monthly flat rates, in-house vs. outsourced vs. DIY
- [Corporate Tax Filing in Toronto: The T2 Guide](https://franklyfinancial.co/blog/corporate-tax-filing-toronto): deadlines, the 11.2% small business rate effective July 1 2026
- [HST for Ontario Small Businesses](https://franklyfinancial.co/blog/hst-small-business-ontario): $30,000 threshold, registration, Quick Method
- [Sole Proprietorship vs. Incorporation in Ontario](https://franklyfinancial.co/blog/incorporation-vs-sole-proprietorship-ontario): tax math and when incorporating pays off
- [Small Business Tax Write-Offs in Canada](https://franklyfinancial.co/blog/small-business-tax-deductions-canada): 2026 deduction checklist
- [Payroll for Small Businesses in Ontario](https://franklyfinancial.co/blog/payroll-small-business-ontario): 2026 CPP/EI numbers, remittances
- [Catch-Up Bookkeeping for Toronto Businesses](https://franklyfinancial.co/blog/catch-up-bookkeeping-toronto): costs, CRA penalties, Voluntary Disclosures Program

## Key pages
- [Blog index](https://franklyfinancial.co/blog/): all guides for Toronto small businesses
- [Get a quote](https://franklyfinancial.co/quote): pricing for bookkeeping and tax services
